inputs.prompt: Content: A colour photograph of a street market, estimated 1980s, found in a local newspaper archive. No photographer credit. The newspaper (The Riverside Gazette) ceased publication in 2003. Content type: Photograph. Jurisdiction: United Kingdom. Intended use: Editorial use in a television documentary.
Content: A short film clip found on YouTube with no attribution. Appears to be from the 1990s. Content type: Video footage. Intended use: YouTube documentary.

Content: A recording of a classical music performance from the 1970s, broadcast on RAI (Italian state broadcaster). The orchestra is believed to have been dissolved. Content type: Music recording. Jurisdiction: Italy. Intended use: Feature documentary for European broadcast and streaming.
